name: Tim Heidecker
bio: Tim Heidecker is an American comedian, actor, writer, and musician, best known as one half of the duo Tim and Eric, whose Adult Swim shows defined a deliberately abrasive, anti-comedy aesthetic. His 2020 special An Evening with Tim Heidecker is a stand-up special that parodies the conventions of stand-up itself through an obnoxious onstage persona. He also stars in the long-running web series On Cinema alongside Gregg Turkington.

timeline.ev: Tom Goes to the Mayor debuts on Adult Swim
